title: Section 62A Planning Application: S62A/2025/0108 11-13 High Street, Westbury, Bristol City, Bristol, BS9 3BF
body: "Type of application:  Full Planning Application  Applicant name:  SWE Property Management Ltd  Site address:  11-13 High Street, Westbury, Bristol City, Bristol, BS9 3BF  Description of proposed development:  First-floor extension to rear of shop and creation of dwelling (Use Class C3) with associated works.  Case Officer:  Section 62A Applications Team  Procedure:   Written Representations  Key dates:      Date     Date application valid 2 June 2025   Date by when representations must be made 4 July 2025   Hearing date and venue NA   Target Decision 28 July 2025   Decision date 17 July 2025     Decision   Decision Notice and Statement of Reasons  (PDF, 143 KB, 8 pages)   Make a representation  The application can be inspected under the application plans and documents heading below.  You will be able to comment on this application until 4 July 2025.  Please base your comments on planning matters.  Please avoid the use of inflammatory, discriminatory or abusive comments  All representations made in connection with the development proposal will be made publicly available on the website shortly after the end of the representation period.  The name of the individual author or organisation will be published however addresses, signatures and contact details will not be published.  We advise you not to include any other personal information about yourself or others. Our Customer Privacy Notice sets out how we handle personal data in accordance with the law.  Send your comments via email to  section62anonmajor@planninginspectorate.gov.uk  or write to Section 62A Applications Team, Planning Inspectorate, 3rd Floor, Temple Quay House, 2 The Square, Temple Quay, Bristol, BS1 6PN  Sending comments by email will enable us to deal with them more quickly.  Please include the application reference number S62A/2025/0108 and site address.  This application will be determined by an Inspector appointed by the Secretary of State.  Shortly after the close of the representation period the Planning Inspectorate will consider whether a hearing is necessary.   In the event that a hearing is scheduled, and you would wish to speak at the hearing, you must make this request at the time you submit your written representations.  Where the application is to be considered at a hearing, notice of the date, time and venue for the hearing along with the name of the person holding the hearing, will be published on this website at least one week before the date of the hearing.   Application Plans and Documents     Application Form  (PDF, 390 KB, 15 pages)  Cover Ltr PR02321 v2  (PDF, 4.1 MB, 35 pages)  000-24 Existing Proposed Site Plans  (PDF, 172 KB, 1 page)  001-24A Existing Grnd Flr Plan  (PDF, 88.6 KB, 1 page)  002-24A Existing 1st Flr Plan  (PDF, 106 KB, 1 page)  003-24 Existing 2nd Flr Plan  (PDF, 95.9 KB, 1 page)  004-24 Existing 3rd Flr Plan  (PDF, 55.2 KB, 1 page)  005-24 Existing Roof Plan  (PDF, 34.9 KB, 1 page)  006-24 Existing Front Rear Elevs  (PDF, 42.7 KB, 1 page)  007-24 Existing Side Elevs Sections  (PDF, 40.4 KB, 1 page)  008-24C Proposed Grnd Flr Plan  (PDF, 302 KB, 1 page)  009-24B Proposed 1st Flr Plan  (PDF, 230 KB, 1 page)  010-24 Proposed 2nd Flr...
